case_title: JAINE KIM VS. AZALEA BOUTIQUE INC.

docket_entries.description: REMARK: PLANTIFF'S EXHIBITS RECD VIA MAIL 7/25/22 SUBMITTED
REQUEST TO APPEAR AT HEARING BY ZOOM FILED BY PLAINTIFF KIM, JAINE

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF SEP-19-2022 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF SEP-19-2022 BY MICHELLE TONG. PLAINTIFF JAINE KIM IS PRESENT VIA ZOOM. DEFENDANT AZALEA BOUTIQUE INC. IS NOT PRESENT. THE COURT VOIR DIRED THE SERVER EDMOND YIP BY PHONE AND FOUND SERVICE IS PROPER. THE SERVER SERVED THE AZALEA STORE MANAGER AT 411 HAYES ST., SAN FRANCISCO. PLAINTIFF EXHIBITS RETAINED. PRIOR TO THE HEARING HONORABLE MICHELLE TONG GAVE DISCLOSURE ABOUT CAMPAIGN CONTRIBUTIONS MADE. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: D. AU. NOT REPORTED. (D506).

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF KIM, JAINE RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT AZALEA BOUTIQUE INC. $3,845.00 PRINCIPAL, $50.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,895.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT
ABSTRACT OF JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF KIM, JAINE AS TO DEFENDANT AZALEA BOUTIQUE INC.
REQUEST TO APPEAR AT HEARING BY ZOOM FILED BY PLAINTIFF KIM, JAINE

PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (NO SERVICE FEE INDICATED) SERVED JUL-11-2022, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT AZALEA BOUTIQUE INC.
ORDER RE: REQUEST TO APPEAR AT HEARING BY ZOOM(PLANTIFF)**GRANTED**
REMARK: RETURN MAIL RECD. NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT MAILED TO AZALEA BOTIQUE-NOT DELIVERABLE AS ADDRESSED
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $3,845.00 FILED BY KIM, JAINE AS TO DEFENDANT AZALEA BOUTIQUE INC. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUL-29-2022 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
DECLARATION RE: REQUEST TO APPEAR AT HEARING BY ZOOM FILED BY PLAINTIFF KIM, JAINE

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUL-29-2022 - CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE TO SEP-19-2022 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF JAINE KIM IS PRESENT VIA ZOOM. PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON JULY 19TH, 2022 IS NOT VALID. PROOF OF SERVICE WAS NOT COMPLETE. DEFENDANT AZALEA BOUTIQUE INC IS NOT PRESENT. PLAINTIFF EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: D. AU. NOT REPORTED. (506)
WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY FILED BY PLAINTIFF KIM, JAINE AS TO DEFENDANT AZALEA BOUTIQUE INC.

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF SEP-19-2022 - JUDGMENT.
